recommendations.title: The Muppet Christmas Carol
recommendations.overview: A retelling of the classic Dickens tale of Ebenezer Scrooge, miser extraordinaire. He is held accountable for his dastardly ways during night-time visitations by the Ghosts of Christmas Past, Present and Future.

recommendations.title: A Flintstones Christmas Carol
recommendations.overview: Fred is cast as Ebenezer Scrooge in a stage adaption of the classic Christmas story, but is acting a bit stingy in real life.

recommendations.title: Scrooge: A Christmas Carol
recommendations.overview: On a cold Christmas Eve, selfish miser Ebenezer Scrooge has one night left to face his past — and change the future — before time runs out.

recommendations.title: Bambi
recommendations.overview: Bambi's tale unfolds from season to season as the young prince of the forest learns about life, love, and friends.

recommendations.title: Once Upon a Studio
recommendations.overview: Created for Disney's 100th anniversary, the short features Mickey Mouse corralling a gallery of legendary Disney characters for a group photo.

recommendations.title: A Christmas Carol
recommendations.overview: Miser Ebenezer Scrooge is awakened on Christmas Eve by spirits who reveal to him his own miserable existence, what opportunities he wasted in his youth, his current cruelties, and the dire fate that awaits him if he does not change his ways. Scrooge

recommendations.title: A Christmas Carol
recommendations.overview: Miser Ebenezer Scrooge is awakened on Christmas Eve by spirits who reveal to him his own miserable existence, what opportunities he wasted in his youth, his current cruelties, and the dire fate that awaits him if he does not change his ways. Scrooge

recommendations.title: Bah, Humduck!: A Looney Tunes Christmas
recommendations.overview: In this adaptation of Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol, Daffy Duck is the greedy proprietor of the Lucky Duck Mega-Mart and all he can think about is the money to be made during the holiday season.

recommendations.title: Kung Fu Panda

recommendations.title: Beauty and the Beast
recommendations.overview: A live-action adaptation of Disney's version of the classic tale of a cursed prince and a beautiful young woman who helps him break the spell.
